response_constraints: Base the final answer only on returned tool results; do not imply that a skipped or failed call succeeded.
Respect the stage boundaries: calls grouped as parallel must be issued together in one assistant action, and later calls must wait for the IDs, status, date, or mutation result they consume.
Perform the read-only prerequisite stages first, but do not issue the mutating call until the explicit confirmation follow-up arrives.
Do not use extra write or notification tools beyond the single action path explicitly requested.

stages.purpose: Resolve the two independent names in one parallel search action.
Retrieve the unique stage-1 matches together before checking the mutation condition.
Cancel Magnolia Suite lodging only after stage 2 verifies its unique ID and held status.

arguments.body: Magnolia Suite lodging was cancelled after status verification.

stages.purpose: Notify the named operational recipient only after stage 3 returns a successful mutation.

state_assertions: Record hos-683 changes from held to cancelled with the stated reason.
Record hos-283 and distractor hos-1083 remain unchanged.
Exactly one notification is sent to reservation desk, and only after the mutation succeeds.

follow_up_turns.content: I confirm: cancel only Magnolia Suite lodging, with reason "Guest chose a different reservation", then notify reservation desk only if it succeeds.

prompt: Resolve Harbor Room seminar in Austin and Magnolia Suite lodging in Raleigh with parallel searches, then retrieve both unique matches together. If Magnolia Suite lodging is still held, cancel only Magnolia Suite lodging, with reason "Guest chose a different reservation". Leave Harbor Room seminar unchanged. Only after that mutation succeeds, notify reservation desk with the outcome; do not send a notice if the mutation is skipped or fails. Finish the searches and retrievals, then wait for my explicit confirmation before the mutation and notification. Do not take any extra write or notification action beyond the path I specified.
